commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces ACP runtime-control cache signatures with an applied-runtime-options baseline so startup-applied model/thinking/cwd can be skipped while post-start controls still reconcile before turns.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +168. Total +179 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: initialize/resume seeds model/thinking, runtime-option persistence clears `appliedRuntimeOptions`, and the next turn builds the full config-option list with model/thinking before permission/timeout. I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
